data.name: Yoohee

weaponImprint.name: Sparkling Centerstage
weaponImprint.trait: Gains 1 random buff for 1 turn if the user has full HP at the start of the action.
weaponImprint.effect: When allied units deal Physical damage by active attacks, ignores 10% of the enemy target's defense. For each buff applied to allied units (excluding the user), the user's Physical damage dealt by active attacks ignores 4% of the target's defense, up to a maximum of 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A passionate and responsible Doll who's devoted to the art of dancing. A compliment from the Commander set her on the path to becoming a dancer, and she founded the dancing troupe called "Sparkle Squad" to provide wandering Dolls with a place to call home and thus do justice to her position as a veteran Doll.

skills.name: Rhythmic Pulse
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Main Dancer's Aura
skills.description:
When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6]. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6]. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield, and applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has Troupe's Core, Never Give Up gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
The effects of Dance Steps on Yoohee are doubled (critical damage is increased by 20%, restores 40% HP after attacking, gains 3 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a]).

Each buff applied to other allied units increases Yoohee's attack by 1.5%, to a maximum increase of 45%.

When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6], and applies [effect:ed4e137f-f1e2-4ec9-ad1f-fd5b4e49b361] to all allied units for 2 turns. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield, and applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has Troupe's Core, Never Give Up gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of the active skills Graceful Pirouette and Passionate Resonance is expanded to cover the entire battlefield.

The active skill Graceful Pirouette gains a new effect: The selected target restores HP equal to 15% of max HP.

The active skill Passionate Resonance gains a new effect: Cleanses 1 debuff from the selected target.

When [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] is triggered, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has [effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219], [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6] gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The effects of [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136] on Yoohee are doubled (critical damage is increased by 20%, restores 40% HP after attacking, gains 3 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a]).

Each buff applied to other allied units increases Yoohee's attack by 1.5%, to a maximum increase of 45%.

When [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] is triggered, applies [effect:ed4e137f-f1e2-4ec9-ad1f-fd5b4e49b361] to all allied units for 2 turns.

skills.name: Improv
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to it. If Yoohee has 3 or more points of Confectance Index, expends an additional 2 points of Confectance Index to ignore 30% of the target's defense for this attack.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to it. If Yoohee has 3 or more points of Confectance Index, expends an additional 2 points of Confectance Index to ignore 30% of the target's defense for this attack.

For each [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136] applied, gains 1 stack of [effect:53abe266-1be0-4046-9559-80c77f3c1fdb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased by 60%.

For each [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136] applied, gains 1 stack of [effect:53abe266-1be0-4046-9559-80c77f3c1fdb].

skills.name: Soul of Dance
skills.description:
Selects 1 allied unit within 8 tiles, applies [effect:605469b0-839e-45ea-bbda-bf78fcf3d3f2] to it and all allied units within 2 tiles of the selected allied unit for 2 turns. Deals AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy units within that area and inflicts [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn.

After the attack, Yoohee gains 1 use of the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 allied unit within 8 tiles, applies [effect:744ff25d-8d84-41ee-803d-1dfdbe411330] to it and all allied units within 3 tiles of the selected allied unit for 2 turns. In addition, cleanses them of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790]. Deals AoE Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to all enemy units within that area and inflicts [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn.

After the attack, Yoohee gains 1 use of the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased by 50%.

Area of effect is increased by 1 tile.

[effect:744ff25d-8d84-41ee-803d-1dfdbe411330] is applied instead of [effect:605469b0-839e-45ea-bbda-bf78fcf3d3f2].

In addition, cleanses all allied units of, [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790].

skills.name: Sparkling Finale
skills.description: Yoohee gains [effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219] for 3 turns. Applies [effect:cf59f913-f165-4a7e-bbc4-32bdcd2e8570] to all allied units for 2 turns. After using this skill, Yoohee gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Yoohee gains [effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219] for 3 turns. Applies [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] and [effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] to all allied units for 2 turns. After using this skill, Yoohee gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. When using the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance on this turn, the effects are applied to all allied units.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Yoohee gains 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6], and [effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219] for 3 turns. Applies [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] and [effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] to all allied units for 2 turns. After using this skill, Yoohee gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. When using the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance on this turn, the effects are applied to all allied units.

Every 2 times [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] is triggered, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] is applied instead of [effect:cf59f913-f165-4a7e-bbc4-32bdcd2e8570].

In addition, this skill applies [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] to all allied units for 2 turns.

After using this skill, when Yoohee uses the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance on this turn, the effects are applied to all allied units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Yoohee gains 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6].

[effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219] gains a new effect: When attacking, ignores 50% of the target's defense. After triggering the effects of [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4], the active skill Improv is triggered on the enemy unit with the highest HP within attack range. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn. Graceful Pirouette and Passionate Resonance cannot be used after that instance of the skill.

Every 2 times [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] is triggered, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 1 turn.

skills.name: Graceful Pirouette
skills.description: Applies [effect:64f50bb4-3173-4832-ab36-5dcdc715be66] and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] to 1 allied unit (excluding Yoohee) for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Applies [effect:64f50bb4-3173-4832-ab36-5dcdc715be66] and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] to 1 allied unit (excluding Yoohee) for 3 turns.

In addition, the selected target restores HP equal to 15% of max HP.

skills.name: Passionate Resonance
skills.description: Applies [effect:40ab5759-f31c-40c0-9bf3-82ef14bdc925] and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] to 1 allied unit (excluding Yoohee) for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Applies [effect:40ab5759-f31c-40c0-9bf3-82ef14bdc925] and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] to 1 allied unit (excluding Yoohee) for 3 turns.

In addition, cleanses 1 debuff from the selected target.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of the active skills Graceful Pirouette and Passionate Resonance is expanded to cover the entire battlefield.

The active skill Graceful Pirouette gains a new effect: The selected target restores HP equal to 15% of max HP.

The active skill Passionate Resonance gains a new effect: Cleanses 1 debuff from the selected target.

When [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] is triggered, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has [effect:ddeb3124-75b2-409d-9f82-2c94a1011219], [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6] gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.

keys.displayTitle: Affinity Key - Big Bright Shining Star

keys.effect: When dealing damage which contains an ammo attribute, damage dealt is increased by 10%.

After using the Ultimate skill Sparkling Finale, when using the active skill Graceful Pirouette or Passionate Resonance, the skill will be triggered on the 2 allied units with the highest attack (excluding Yoohee herself and the selected target). These two skills cannot be triggered again during the current turn.

When dealing Physical damage via passive effects, [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6] is triggered. This effect is no longer nullified when allied units deal phase damage.

Healing received by all allied units is increased by 50%.

At the start of battle, for each physical-element allied unit on the battlefield, Physical damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 3%, up to a maximum of 15%.
When the active skill Improv expends additional Confectance Index, critical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
After triggering [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4], restores HP equal to 20% of max HP.
When using the active skill Improv, cleanses 1 random buff from the target before the attack resolves.

After using the active skill Soul of Dance to inflict [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to an enemy target, when [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] is removed, applies [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to the target for 1 turn.
If Yoohee did not move on this turn, her basic attack and active skill range is increased by 3 tiles on her next turn.
When [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6] is in effect, Yoohee's attack is increased by 10%.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] is applied instead of [effect:cf59f913-f165-4a7e-bbc4-32bdcd2e8570].

In addition, this skill applies [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] to all allied units for 2 turns.

After using this skill, when Yoohee uses the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance on this turn, the effects are applied to all allied units.

doll.name: Yoohee
doll.effects: A passionate and responsible Doll who's devoted to the art of dancing. A compliment from the Commander set her on the path to becoming a dancer, and she founded the dancing troupe called "Sparkle Squad" to provide wandering Dolls with a place to call home and thus do justice to her position as a veteran Doll.

skillsLevel2.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to it. If Yoohee has 3 or more points of Confectance Index, expends an additional 2 points of Confectance Index to ignore 30% of the target's defense for this attack.

skillsLevel2.name: Soul of Dance
skillsLevel2.description:
Selects 1 allied unit within 8 tiles, applies [effect:605469b0-839e-45ea-bbda-bf78fcf3d3f2] to it and all allied units within 2 tiles of the selected allied unit for 2 turns. Deals AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy units within that area and inflicts [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn.

After the attack, Yoohee gains 1 use of the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 allied unit within 8 tiles, applies [effect:744ff25d-8d84-41ee-803d-1dfdbe411330] to it and all allied units within 3 tiles of the selected allied unit for 2 turns. In addition, cleanses them of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790]. Deals AoE Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to all enemy units within that area and inflicts [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn.

After the attack, Yoohee gains 1 use of the active skill Graceful Pirouette or the active skill Passionate Resonance.

vertebrae.effect:
The effects of [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136] on Yoohee are doubled (critical damage is increased by 20%, restores 40% HP after attacking, gains 3 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a]).

Each buff applied to other allied units increases Yoohee's attack by 1.5%, to a maximum increase of 45%.

doll.name: Yoohee
doll.effects: A passionate and responsible Doll who's devoted to the art of dancing. A compliment from the Commander set her on the path to becoming a dancer, and she founded the dancing troupe called "Sparkle Squad" to provide wandering Dolls with a place to call home and thus do justice to her position as a veteran Doll.

skillsLevel3.name: Main Dancer's Aura
skillsLevel3.description:
When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6]. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6]. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield, and applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has Troupe's Core, Never Give Up gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.

The effects of Dance Steps on Yoohee are doubled (critical damage is increased by 20%, restores 40% HP after attacking, gains 3 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a]).

Each buff applied to other allied units increases Yoohee's attack by 1.5%, to a maximum increase of 45%.

When allied units deal Physical damage, Yoohee gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After Yoohee uses a basic attack or an active skill, she can use the active skill [dollSkill:559d73ff-2845-42ca-97a4-0baf91d0b0ee] or the active skill [dollSkill:8a3b9e2f-8bee-4dc8-9583-be9039e760f8] (this effect cannot be triggered repeatedly).

Whenever Yoohee applies 3 or more [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136], triggers [effect:c693651c-6acb-4f07-948b-2b58102d94c4] once, gaining 1 stack of [effect:31a60976-a420-487c-9ddb-c97941d898b6], and applies [effect:ed4e137f-f1e2-4ec9-ad1f-fd5b4e49b361] to all allied units for 2 turns. In addition, refreshes the durations of all Dance Steps and [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] stacks across the entire battlefield, and applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the enemy unit with the highest initial defense for 3 turns.

When Yoohee has Troupe's Core, Never Give Up gains an additional effect: Damage taken by allied units is reduced by 30%.

imagoforms.effect: When Physical allied units deal damage, they ignore 5% of the target's defense. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Effect depends on the firstly applied 3 Dance Steps; Each [effect:64f50bb4-3173-4832-ab36-5dcdc715be66] heals all allied units on the battlefield for 15% of max HP, each [effect:40ab5759-f31c-40c0-9bf3-82ef14bdc925] cleanses 1 debuff from all allied units on the battlefield (If Best Dancer has already been triggered this turn, Yoohee will not play the dancing animation but the skill effect will still take place).
Includes Graceful Spin and Passionate Spin.
On the next turn, the active skill Improv is improved. Critical rate is increased by 15%, and it ignores 10% of the target's defense, maximum of 3 stacks. Cannot be cleansed.
Critical damage is increased by 10%. After attacking, restores HP equal to 20% of attack. Mutually exclusive with [effect:40ab5759-f31c-40c0-9bf3-82ef14bdc925]. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

When allied units deal Physical damage by active attacks, ignore 15% of the target's defense. Maximum of 4 stacks. When allied units deal Phase damage, this effect will be ineffective for 2 rounds. Cannot be cleansed.

Critical damage is increased by 10%. At the end if this unit's turn, gains 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a]. Mutually exclusive with [effect:64f50bb4-3173-4832-ab36-5dcdc715be66]. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.
When dealing Physical damage, critical damage is increased by 25%. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.
When Yoohee applies [effect:dc536658-f405-4a52-bb74-3061134cf136] or [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] to an allied unit (excluding Yoohee), Yoohee gains one stack of that effect.
